title: Terms of Service
metaDescription: Review the Terms of Service for ConvertBase.app, including acceptable use, cookies, analytics and advertising.
heading: Terms of Service
content: These Terms of Service govern your access to and use of ConvertBase.app and its public online tools.
By using the platform, you agree to use the site lawfully, responsibly and only for personal, educational or business purposes that comply with applicable law.

sections.title: Use of the platform
paragraphs: You may use ConvertBase.app to access public tools and informational pages. You must not use the site to break the law, interfere with service availability or abuse automated systems.
We may update, replace or remove tools and content at any time when needed for quality, security or maintenance.

sections.title: Content, analytics and ads
paragraphs: The platform may include information pages, generated outputs, internal links, cookies, analytics and advertising. Google Analytics may help us measure traffic, and Google AdSense may help fund the service.
Your use of the site also means that cookies and similar technologies may operate as described in our Privacy Policy and Cookie Policy.

sections.title: No warranty and contact
paragraphs: ConvertBase.app is provided on an as-is basis. We work to keep the information useful and the tools available, but we cannot guarantee uninterrupted access or perfect accuracy for every use case.
For questions about these terms, contact the operator of ConvertBase.app at contact@convertbase.app.
